mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations and generating positive forward returns for the S&P 500.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive forward returns do not significantly exceed baseline during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or trigger fails to predict direction with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates robust domestic demand, which drives corporate revenue growth and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Joint signal shows no predictive power over single-series baselines, or interaction term loses significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during periods of low inflation reflects healthy economic expansion without overheating, supporting equity markets and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Signal reverses direction when inflation exceeds 3%, or forward returns are negative in > 55% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: Steady increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect expanding economic activity and corporate hiring, which correlates with positive earnings revisions and positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 2-year windows, or payroll growth shows no correlation with 5-day forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the consumer price index above 2.5% year-over-year triggers expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally despite high inflation readings, or negative returns fail to materialize in > 65% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising GDP growth and falling real personal consumption expenditures indicates weak household demand despite macro expansion, leading to negative corporate earnings surprises and negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Interaction effect vanishes in out-of-sample tests, or forward returns remain positive when consumption lags GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: Declines in industrial production signal contracting manufacturing output and reduced corporate capacity utilization, which forecasts lower earnings and negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or industrial production declines fail to predict negative 5-day returns.
